title: Study 5 PPS box-breathing profile
citation: PPS Toolkit Study 5 protocol (2026). Box-breathing audio-tactile PPS profile. Unpublished lab profile.
notes: Local unpublished Study 5 preload. This profile is not a published-study citation; it preloads the lab's box-breathing PPS workflow with bundled 4-second inhale/exhale instruction assets, Study 5 trajectory defaults, SOAs, catch trials, and within-block trial type rows.

provenance.source: Bundled owned Study 5 breathing instruction WAVs include both assets/breathing/british_kokoro generated with Kokoro ONNX using the British English bf_emma voice and assets/breathing/original_study5 decoded from the original local Study 5 instruction MP3s. The default preload uses the British Kokoro pair, while the original Study 5 inhale/exhale clips are exposed as alternate fixed-audio sources.

Bundled owned Study 5 auditory-only looming WAVs under assets/preloads/study5_box_breathing_pps/02_looming_stimuli; the preload inventory records the original generated-noise recipe, trajectory metadata, segment catalog paths, and SHA-256 hashes.

Local Study 5 dashboard workflow uses within-block trial type rows: Inhale instruction | Looming Stimulus and Exhale instruction | Looming Stimulus. Rows are logged as trial_type_label values and scheduled sequentially top-to-bottom inside each block.
Study 5 toolkit defaults: 110 cm to 10 cm approach, 3 s movement inside a 4 s stimulus window, SOAs 300/800/1500/2200/2700 ms.
